name: The Slugcats
description:
While you explore the outskirts, you manage to find a group of slugcats in the middle of your exploration. They’re all curious of you, but also afraid that you may be bad. Earn their trust and explore around the world with them, finding bunkers and fighting dangerous creatures.

( changed Nightcat to The Watcher )

[ Game: Rainworld ]
creator: Puggler
